name: Largo
description: You hear that? It's time to start the show. Largo, the Bard Monk The exiled Murkroots of Velu’Mar discovered a living island so ancient it speaks only in song. Raised among the shamanic bards who learned to commune with it, Largo now roams the realms with a troupe of frogling disciples, looking for inspiration for new melodies to bring back and share with his island home.

abilities.name: Encore
abilities.description: Whenever Largo applies a unit-targeted buff to an allied hero, he also applies the buff to self. Doubletap applies the buff to the nearest allied hero within the cast range of the unit-targeted ability. Duration Amp: 9%. Duration Amp Increase: 1%. Cast Range to Multicast Range Factor: (1).

abilities.name: Catchy Lick
abilities.description: Pulls the targeted unit a short distance, and applies a basic dispel. Buff or debuffs dispelled from the targeted unit grants self health regeneration bonus. Deals damage to the pulled unit-targeted enemy. Has a lesser pull distance on enemy units. Cast Range: 700 (800). Ally Pull Distance: 375 (475). Health Regen Bonus: 4/7/10/13 (10/17.5/25/32.5). Pull Duration: 0.3. Buff Duration: 8. Enemy Pull Distance: 235/265/295/325 (285/315/345/375). Cooldown: 13/11/9/7. Mana Cost: 80/85/90/95.

abilities.name: Frogstomp
abilities.description: Tosses froglings to the area-targeted location. The froglings deals damage, stuns, and apply movement speed slow to all enemy units within the radius. Cast Range: 800. Effect Radius: 350. Number of Instances: 4/5/6/7. Damage per Second: 36/48/60/72 (51/63/75/87). Move Speed Slow: 12%/18%/24%/30%. Stun Duration per Instance: 0.1. Cooldown: 20/18/16/14. Mana Cost: 85/95/105/115.

abilities.name: Croak of Genius
abilities.description: Spell damage applied to enemy heroes sourced to the buff-affected allied hero is reapplied as an additional magical spell damage per second. Cast Range: 800. Mana Loss Reduction: 0.85. Ability Mana Cost Threshold: 0. Buff Duration Reduction per Ability Cast: 0.5. Total Buff Duration: 12/18/24/30. Max Distance: 2000. Cooldown: 25/35/45/55.

abilities.name: Amphibian Rhapsody
abilities.description: Switches the ability bar switches to three song abilities, each with different ability effects. Largo can cast one Amphibian Rhapsody-based abilities at any given time. Gains a Groovin' stack per successful strum on beat, which grants bonus armor and reduces the mana cost of the song abilities. Largo loses a Groovin' stack whenever he misses a beat. Self-disarms upon casting any song abilities. Effect Radius: 800. Proc Interval: 1. Grace Time: 0.4. Armor per Stack: 2/3/4. Song Mana Cost Reduction per Stack: 1/1.5/2. Stack Linger Duration: 5. Mana Cost: 2.
